labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Unknown" provides 3 tools focused on file management tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, deletion and cleanup. Key tools: mcp_dropbin_create_webpage, mcp_dropbin_delete_content, mcp_dropbin_get_content_info.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "File Management" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: upload.

tools.name: mcp_dropbin_create_webpage
tools.description: Create a shareable webpage or website by uploading HTML content to DropBin. Use when you need to host web content, create a demo page, build a website, share formatted content, or publish temporary HTML for others to view in a browser. Perfect for creating websites, landing pages, portfolios, or any web-based content. Returns a public URL that can be accessed by anyone.

content.description: The HTML content to upload. Include full markup like <html><body>...</body></html>.

expires_in_days.description: Number of days until the content automatically expires and is deleted (default: 7 days)

title.description: Optional descriptive title for the content (helps with organization and identification)

tools.name: mcp_dropbin_delete_content
tools.description: Delete previously uploaded content from DropBin before it expires naturally. Use when you need to remove content early, clean up test uploads, or ensure sensitive content is no longer accessible. This immediately removes both the content and its public URL.

id.description: Unique identifier of the content to delete (returned when content was originally uploaded)

tools.name: mcp_dropbin_get_content_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about previously uploaded content including metadata, expiration time, and public URL. Use when you need to check if content still exists, see when it expires, or retrieve the sharing URL for existing content.

id.description: Unique identifier of the content to retrieve information about
